active_blockers.description: Wishlist/community pins still use local prototype storage for most flows. Real cross-device sharing requires Supabase persistence for wishlist, public_places, and community_reviews.
User explicitly requested gemini-3.0-flash only. If Google API rejects that model id in the connected account, AI routes will show fallback diagnostics until the exact enabled model id is adjusted.

completed_critical_fixes.description: Google login now calls Supabase OAuth callback and creates/loads a real group invite snapshot through /api/groups/ensure.
Added /join/[code] and /api/groups/join so a second user can accept a real invite after Google login.
Kakao map loading now keeps a visible fallback diagnostic and Kakao place search can use a REST API fallback when the JS SDK services are unavailable.
AI page now has segmented plan, wishlist, and link extraction flows using gemini-3.0-flash only, with readable diagnostics and fallbacks.
Cleaned mojibake in app/components/lib paths and rebuilt primary app screens in readable Korean.

pending_warnings: Supabase SQL schema must be applied in the hosted project for real group invite APIs to work.
Vercel must include NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, GEMINI_API_KEY, NEXT_PUBLIC_KAKAO_MAP_KEY, and KAKAO_REST_API_KEY.
Full cross-device wishlist/community persistence is the next backend step.
